title: xo sync — last-sync state per peer
description: Per-peer sync metadata: vector clocks (preferred) or content-addressed manifest hashes. Updated by the sync service after every push/pull.

peers.description: Map of peer user_id → sync state.

manifest_hash.description: Hash of the last synced file manifest. Used as a fallback if vector clocks aren't available.

pending_outbox.description: Count of local events not yet pushed to this peer.
